description: A farmer wants to plant soybeans in a field where they applied a corn herbicide last year and needs to check for carryover risk.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the application history for the field to identify the specific herbicide used last year and the date it was applied.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that Atrazine was applied last May.

nodes.task_description: Check the herbicide label for plant-back restrictions for soybeans.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the label specifies a 12-month waiting period before planting soybeans.

nodes.task_description: Advise the farmer that planting soybeans is not recommended due to the high risk of crop injury from herbicide carryover.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear and correct recommendation based on the label.
